description: The image captures a serene indoor setting at night. Dominating the scene are two windows adorned with yellow curtains that hang from white frames. The left window hosts a plant, its leaves reaching out into the room, while a blue vase sits on the right window sill. The background is shrouded in darkness, punctuated by a faint light source positioned to the right of the image. This light casts an ethereal glow over the scene, enhancing the overall ambiance and creating a sense of tranquility.
